dsl_rule.translation_notes: Dual moving average crossover using sma_20 (short-term) and sma_80 (long-term) as specified in parameters. Signal is context-dependent with both long and short entry/exit conditions based on crossover direction. Target regime restricted to TRENDING states. Note: This rule represents an optimized parameter pair from a systematic search; in live backtesting, parameter optimization should be performed on the specified 5-year minimum sample.

backtest_rule.reason: Dual moving average crossover using sma_20 (short-term) and sma_80 (long-term) as specified in parameters. Signal is context-dependent with both long and short entry/exit conditions based on crossover direction. Target regime restricted to TRENDING states. Note: This rule represents an optimized parameter pair from a systematic search; in live backtesting, parameter optimization should be performed on the specified 5-year minimum sample.

source_rule_text: Optimize dual-moving-average crossover rules by systematically searching parameter space to identify the short-term and long-term lookback period pair that produces the highest historical performance.
